title: Wizards and Warriors
description:
this is a modpack for friends to play and explore the world with wizards and warriors
in  a vast world with magic and mountains.
this is mod pack is a server side modpack with magic and exploration its an rpg style modpack
body:
this is a server side mod pack designed 
for fun adventure with dungeons magic mobs friends and loot and more of a mideval and magic feel
and is mod pack is a server side modpack with magic and exploration its an rpg style mod pack that it more focused towards exploring and playing it with your friends.
so if you have any friends that like magic and just playing Minecraft in a huge beautiful world come try out the mod pack for you self and i plan to keep adding on and evolving the pack as time go's on.
so what are you waiting for jump on in (:
